query:
-- Check agentProfiles table for status field
SELECT ap.userId, ap.agentStatus, u.email, u.isActive, u.portalStatus
FROM agent_profiles ap
JOIN users u ON u.id = ap.userId
WHERE ap.agentStatus = 'cancelled' AND (u.isActive = 1 OR u.portalStatus != 'cancelled')
LIMIT 20;
